title: Let us speculate about Evangelion 20th
wikitext:
[]: Let us speculate about Evangelion 20th             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Nov 07, 2014 1:49 pm As you are all well aware a certain show is celebrating it's 20th anniversary in 2015. While we are waiting in the mean time for "Big News" Lets enjoy a little speculation on what surprises we hope to get! First trailer for Final? TV show/End of Eva on Blu-ray? More spin off manga? Yuko Miyamura coming to your house to verbally abuse you? Anno cosplaying as Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Nov 07, 2014 2:13 pm Optimism is bad for you. Realistic predictions: More 7-11/Lawson/etc partnerships More waifu/hasbando figures Eva Store keeps selling ridiculously designed and overpriced clothes North America gets nothing because the market is dead Wishlist: Kotobukiya cranks out at least 2 more 1/400 Eva kits.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Nov 07, 2014 2:20 pm In this case ADV would have been your friend. They probably would have spit out yet another Eva collection complete with things and stuff that really don’t add anything important to the previous collections, since they were all dependent on GAINAX for Eva stuff, and no one in Japan seems to be noticing this 20-year anniversary. Best case scenario? Anno completes and releases Eva Shin. And I’m not even gonna bet on that one.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Nov 07, 2014 2:54 pm Lots of merchandise for sure. Anything beyond that isn't super likely, but I'm going to keep my eyes peeled for collection re-releases and information about Shin.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Nov 07, 2014 2:59 pm Yeah, my expectations for Eva in 2015 are pretty low. . . Anno probably won't release it in 2015, to avoid having to compete with and lose the box office war with Star Wars VII.

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Fri Nov 07, 2014 3:01 pm Why would he care about that?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Nov 07, 2014 3:02 pm I don't think anime and live-action films tend to compete at the American box office all that much.

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Fri Nov 07, 2014 3:06 pm I think he meant the Japanese box office.

[]:             Quote Post by KatsuragiSansa » Fri Nov 07, 2014 5:56 pm Ray wrote: Yeah, my expectations for Eva in 2015 are pretty low. . . Anno probably won't release it in 2015, to avoid having to compete with and lose the box office war with Star Wars VII.

[]: Re: Let us speculate about Evangelion 20th             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Fri Nov 07, 2014 8:19 pm Dataprime wrote: As you are all well aware a certain show is celebrating it's 20th anniversary in 2015.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sat Nov 08, 2014 5:01 pm Hopefully we get a teaser trailer for 3.0+1.0. Though, I don't expect the release of the film in 2015.

[]:             Quote Post by Compiling_Autumn » Sat Nov 08, 2014 6:39 pm I imagine that the 4d ride will be 20 minutes of passengers stuck in stagnating LCL fluid, waiting for their life support systems to fail, followed by a barrage of violent hallucinations.

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Sat Nov 08, 2014 8:33 pm The entire original series and End of Evangelion to get rereleased in 4K UHD. :P [s:159hrghq]That'd never happen[/s:159hrghq]

[]:             Quote Post by mechashiva » Sat Nov 08, 2014 8:40 pm I hope so. At the moment, I don't even have torrents (my ex was smart enough to download the torrents for the original series for him to watch whenever he finds the time while he's out trucking) Maybe if I leave some Tang and cookies by the chimney, Santa Rei will leave me the DVDs for Christmas.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Nov 09, 2014 6:04 pm Giji Shinka wrote: Though, I don't expect the release of the film in 2015.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Sun Nov 09, 2014 6:34 pm Anno himself said its taking longer and Longer to make these films. He joked(?) that maybe it would take another 6 years before Final comes out.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Sun Nov 09, 2014 10:22 pm Lots of merchandise. The Sailor Moon Franchise has been celebrating since let's see 2009... Since that's when 20th anniversary anime DVDs popped up in Japan. But, once 2011-2012 came the show was being promoted like crazy. I think towards the end of this year they should be promoting Eva again.

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Mon Nov 10, 2014 1:21 am I'm hoping for a re-release of NGE+EoE as well. Heck, I'd even settle for a standard DVD release instead of Blu-Ray. Prices for the old DVD collections are outrageous. I'm also hoping for an expansion of Medicom's Real Action Heroes eva line. RAH Mark 06, Unit 03, or an EoE MP eva would be amazing.

[]: Re: Let us speculate about Evangelion 20th             Quote Post by Dataprime » Mon Dec 01, 2014 10:56 am Dataprime wrote: TV show/End of Eva on Blu-ray?

[]: Re: Let us speculate about Evangelion 20th             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Mon Dec 01, 2014 11:45 am Sicarius VI wrote: Maybe if we are lucky, Khara has been secretly working on a modern NGE release for blue-ray. Adding all DC scenes and dubbing them with the rebuild actors. Along with this a EOE blue-ray release. That might be asking too much, but then again, they apparently just got the rights to NGE not so long ago, so it might be a 1% instead of a 0%.

While we are waiting in the mean time for "Big News" Lets enjoy a little speculation on what surprises we hope to get! First trailer for Final? TV show/End of Eva on Blu-ray? More spin off manga?
